payload.title: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.publisher: Metropolitan Transportation Authority / New York City Transit
payload.prepared_for: November 2024 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Demetrius Crichlow, President of New York City Transit

payload.description: Operates all subways and buses in New York City
North America's largest transportation network, serving 15.3 million people across 5,000-square-mile area

$300 million megaproject to bring full accessibility, state of good repair work, and improved passenger circulation to the 14th St complex serving the 1, 2, 3, L, F, and M trains on the west side of Manhattan. Will have nine new elevators, 25 new staircases and 39 renovated staircases, as well as five platform upgrades.
Rockaway Line reconstruction project beginning in January, managed by Hugo Zamora
Recently-rebranded program to make meaningful improvements to stations while they are closed for other planned maintenance and construction work

payload.project_name: 59th St – Columbus Circle switch replacement project
payload.description: Major project to replace multiple switches near the 59th St – Columbus Circle station

payload.raw_value_text: over 4.4 million customers on Wednesday, October 30

payload.description: highest since April 2023
highest in well over a year
highest since February 2012

payload.raw_value_text: increase of 5% from the same time last year
170,000 trips in April 2020, over 840,000 trips in October 2024

issues: metric_claim payload with raw_value_text should include normalized numeric value or value_min/value_max

tool_args.label: Paratransit new applications and recertifications 2024 YTD

payload.raw_value_text: over 30,000 new applications and over 8,000 recertifications
86% of pickups within the 20-minute window from promise time
payload.description: 3% increase compared to September 2024, 1% decrease compared to October 2023

payload.raw_value_text: 94% of trips were completed within the 20-minute pickup window
payload.description: 1% improvement compared to September 2024, 7% improvement compared to October 2023

payload.raw_value_text: on-time performance in the 20-minute window was 92.4% in October 2024

tool_args.label: Subway Customer Journey Time Performance October 2024

payload.description: second-best in all of 2024
up by 1.2% from September 2024 and 0.6% higher than October 2023, with a 12-month average of 94.8%
increased by 1.3% from September 2024, remained stable versus October 2023

tool_args.label: Bus Customer Journey Time Performance October 2024

payload.description: a 2.6% increase from September, though modestly down by 0.4% compared to October 2023

tool_args.label: Average paid weekday subway ridership October 2024

payload.description: about 5.7% higher than in October 2023
5.8% year-over-year growth

tool_args.label: Subway ridership at 8% of 2019 baseline April 2020
Bus ridership at 23% of 2019 baseline April 2020

payload.description: increased by nearly 20% compared to October 2023, total trips increased more than 20%

tool_args.label: Paratransit primary carrier no-show rate October 2024

payload.description: decreased by 1.0 per 1000 trips from last month
decrease of 0.2 per 1,000 trips compared to September
decreased 69% versus last month
NYCT welcomed the billionth subway customer of 2024; two months earlier than 2022
NYCT Reduced-Fare OMNY outreach team attended multilingual event hosted by Bronx Councilman Eric Dinowitz at Moshulu Montefiore Community Center

payload.description: MTA Government & Community Relations attended Multilingual (Spanish) Reduced-Fare OMNY event hosted by Council Member Shaun Abreu in Manhattan
payload.event_name: Reduced-Fare OMNY multilingual event in Manhattan

tool_args.label: I Move NY Campaign Launch October 22

payload.description: MTA Customer Communications team launched new 'I Move NY' Campaign aimed at preventing assaults by humanizing the people behind the uniform. Rolling out 21,000 bus cards across 3,000 buses.

tool_args.label: 14th Street Station New Elevators Opening November 2024

payload.description: Two new elevators opened at 14th Street complex providing access to street level and uptown level of 1, 2, and 3 lines at 14 St and 7 Av

tool_args.label: Paratransit Assessment Center Opening at 3 Stone Street

payload.description: New Paratransit Assessment Center opened at 3 Stone Street, co-located with the New York City Transit Customer Service Center in lower Manhattan

payload.raw_value_text: 5.42 million for the weekend and 2.6 million on Marathon Sunday
payload.description: Marathon weekend, new total weekend and Sunday high

Crimes per million rides decrease October 2024

payload.raw_value_text: Subway Fires decreased over 25% when comparing periods ending October 2024 and October 2023

payload.description: On a scale of 1-10, where 1 is very unsafe and 10 is very safe

payload.location_text: 14 St and 7 Av, providing access to the street level and uptown level of the 1, 2, and 3 lines
payload.description: Two new elevators opened at the Seventh Avenue side of the 14th Street complex, bringing accessibility from the street to the mezzanine and uptown platform of the 1 2 3 trains

payload.location_text: 14 St and 6 Av, providing access from the street to the 6 Av L platform and the uptown F and M platform
payload.description: Three elevators opened earlier in 2024 at Sixth Avenue, making the L and uptown F M accessible

normalized_location.raw_text: 14 St and 6 Av, providing access from the street to the 6 Av L platform and the uptown F and M platform

payload.claim_text: Just as Transit built the City of New York around it, now Transit has led our city's post-COVID recovery
payload.description: President's message attributing ridership recovery to NYCT's work

tool_args.label: Congestion Pricing expected to benefit buses

payload.claim_text: With the upcoming enactment of Congestion Pricing and the continued expansion of our ACE program, we are excited to see the benefits of less crowded roads for our buses
payload.description: Congestion Pricing and ACE program expected to reduce congestion for bus riders

tool_args.label: Student OMNY cards driving ridership growth

payload.claim_text: Approximately 85,000 of this growth of 240,000 can be attributed to use of the new student OMNY cards
payload.description: Student OMNY cards account for about 85,000 of the 240,000 subway ridership growth

tool_args.label: Student OMNY cards bus ridership impact

payload.claim_text: Increased student OMNY cards are estimated to account for 63% of this growth in paid ridership
payload.description: Student OMNY cards account for 63% of bus paid ridership growth
